scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@studybox/shared && npm run db:local:migrate && cross-env WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log vinext dev --port 5173
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@studybox/shared && cross-env WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log vinext build
scripts.build:vps: npm run build --workspace=@studybox/shared && npm run build --workspace=@studybox/api && npm run build --workspace=@studybox/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@studybox/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck --workspace=@studybox/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@studybox/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace=@studybox/shared && npm run test --workspace=@studybox/shared && npm run test --workspace=@studybox/api && npm run test --workspace=@studybox/web
scripts.db:local:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --config scripts/sites-local.wrangler.jsonc
